quick-sip-shop.title: Quick Sip & Shop
quick-sip-shop.description: Coffee and cookies near the station, then a quick vintage browse — in and out feeling like you did the Drive.

coffee-cookie-explore.title: Coffee, Cookie, and Explore
coffee-cookie-explore.description: JJ Bean for the cookie, a bite on the way up, and time to wander Mintage before you head back.

coffee-shop-lunch.title: Coffee, Shop, Lunch
coffee-shop-lunch.description: Caffeine, a shop stop, deli lunch, and LIVIA for a treat — the mid-Drive rhythm without rushing.

all-day-experience.title: Coffee, Shop, Lunch, Activity, Dinner
all-day-experience.description: The full arc: sip, browse, eat, gallery and vintage north of Venables, then settle in for dinner and drinks.
